name: Basic Electrical System Check
description: A general inspection of the e-bike's electrical components, including wiring, connectors, sensors, and display functionality. Checks for loose connections, corrosion, and obvious cable damage.

name: Battery Health & Capacity Test
description: Tests the battery's remaining capacity, charge cycles, internal resistance, and voltage output under load. Identifies early signs of cell degradation.

name: Motor Diagnostic & Noise Analysis
description: Evaluates motor performance, noise levels, internal resistance, torque output, error codes, and abnormal vibration. Includes hub motors or mid-drive systems.

name: Controller/ECU Diagnostic Scan
description: Reads fault/error codes from the motor controller (ECU), checks MOSFET condition and voltage output, and verifies throttle and PAS (pedal-assist sensor) signals.

name: Charger Functionality Test
description: Measures charger voltage, consistency, output under load, and connector integrity to ensure safe and stable charging.

name: Sensor Calibration & Testing
description: Tests and calibrates speed sensor, torque sensor, cadence (PAS) sensor, and brake cutoff sensors. Fixes alignment issues.

name: Drivetrain & Mechanical Safety Check
description: Ensures gears, chain, brakes, bearings, and frame components work correctly with the electric assist system. Identifies mechanical issues affecting motor load.

name: Firmware/Software Diagnostic & Update
description: Runs diagnostics through brand-specific tools (Bosch, Shimano STEPS, Yamaha, Bafang, etc.). Updates firmware for motor, display, and battery.

name: Range & Performance Evaluation
description: Measures real-world range using controlled load testing. Evaluates assist levels, battery drains, and how mechanical issues impact power consumption.

name: Full E-Bike Diagnostic Package
description: Includes complete electrical inspection, battery test, motor test, sensor calibration, and mechanical safety check. Provides a diagnostic report with repair suggestions.
